query:
SELECT 
  mi.id as item_id,
  mi.name as item_name,
  mi.category_id,
  cg.id as group_id,
  cg.name as group_name,
  cg.required,
  cg.min_selections,
  cg.max_selections,
  co.id as option_id,
  co.name as option_name,
  co.price as option_price
FROM menu_items mi
JOIN complement_groups cg ON cg.menu_item_id = mi.id
JOIN complement_options co ON co.group_id = cg.id
ORDER BY mi.name, cg.name, co.name;
